rationale: In the citing paper, Bronnenberg et al. (2000) is cited only once in a grouped methodological parenthesis, as an example of work that specifies market-share attraction models as linear equation systems. The paper does not develop hypotheses from this source, discuss its substantive findings, or use it as a distinct benchmark in interpretation. The core modeling foundation is attributed elsewhere, so this citation functions as a passing method reference rather than a clear, paper-specific dependency.
